message:
feat(extensions-js): capture repair_mode and repair_events in PiJS runtime scope

Clone repair_mode and Arc-clone repair_events from runtime config
into the local scope alongside the existing process_cwd, process_args,
and env bindings. This makes repair state available to the closure
that needs it for extension self-repair diagnostics.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
